description_long: This is a loaf of bread with a golden-brown crust and a slightly rustic, uneven surface. The loaf is elongated and features several deep, rounded score marks across its top, giving it a segmented appearance. The crust is matte with some areas dusted in flour, and the bottom appears slightly rougher and lighter in color. One end of the loaf is rounded and closed, while the other end reveals a small section of a sausage or filling peeking out, suggesting it may be a filled bread. The overall texture of the crust is semi-soft with a gentle roughness, and the loaf looks freshly baked. There are no visible labels, branding, or packaging present.
description: A golden-brown, elongated loaf of bread with deep score marks and a rustic, flour-dusted crust. One end reveals a sausage or filling inside.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the loaf, deep score marks, and a golden-brown, flour-dusted crust.
description_view_1: End view showing the rounded, closed end of the loaf with a slightly rough, baked surface.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the loaf's length, segmented scoring, and a lighter, rougher bottom crust.
description_view_3: End view revealing a sausage or filling protruding from the open end of the loaf.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust has a rustic, matte finish with deep, rounded score marks running across the top, and is lightly dusted with flour. The surface is uneven and slightly rough, with no seeds or decorative toppings.
